description_long: This is a classic green glass wine bottle with a long, gently tapering neck and a deep punt at the base, typical of traditional French wine bottles. The bottle features a large, cream-colored main label on the front, bordered with gold and containing detailed text and a circular red and gold emblem at the top. A secondary neck label wraps around the upper portion, also cream-colored with gold accents, and a red capsule or foil covers the closure at the top. The bottle's body is cylindrical and smooth, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The overall appearance suggests a premium wine, likely from a well-known vineyard, with branding and labeling that emphasize heritage and quality.
description: A green glass wine bottle with a long neck, cream and gold labels, and a red foil capsule covering the closure. The bottle has a glossy finish and detailed branding.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from the side, showing the green glass body and the edge of the cream-colored label, with the red foil capsule visible at the top.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main cream and gold label with detailed text and a circular emblem, as well as the neck label and red foil capsule.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side view highlights the green glass body and the edge of the main label, with the red foil capsule at the top.
description_view_3: This view is nearly identical to view 1, showing the main label, neck label, and red foil capsule clearly from the front.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle features a large cream-colored main label with gold borders and detailed text, including a circular red and gold emblem at the top. There is also a cream and gold neck label wrapping around the upper neck. The main label includes the wording 'Côte-Rôtie' and other fine print, with branding elements that suggest a French wine.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, gently tapering neck with a slight flare at the lip and a smooth profile.
